'''Geridard''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Geridard system/Legends|Geridard system]] of [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]]. It was known for its retirement and medical facilities, catering to renowned corporate officials. [[Augusta I'att]] was to enter the [[Geridard Convalescent Center]], though she was executed before ever attending.
